title: gilia pharnaceoides var. harknessii
intro: Gilia pharnaceoides var. harknessii is a rare and lesser-known variety of the pharnaceoides gilia plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Native American medicine, where it is believed to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gilia pharnaceoides var. harknessii include its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tincture or infused in hot water to create a tea, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
